_comment: Single source of truth for the i18n-supported locales (Stage A/B). Consumed by tools/apps/web_runner/stage_assets.py (web playground language list) and scripts/ci/ci.sh via tools/apps/screenshot_generator/gen_gallery.py (multi-language screenshot gallery). Order = English first, then the rest alphabetical by English name (production lists native-first for users; these dev tools favor English for developers). Display label is 'english (native)' — English readable name first, native name/script second (collapses to just 'english' when they match). 'pack_locales' ship a fetched/registered font pack (Greek/Cyrillic/Vietnamese script packs + CJK corpus packs + the fa Arabic/Persian pack); the rest are covered by the baked OpenSans Western baseline. fa is the first Phase-2 (RTL) pack via LVGL presentation forms: its NotoSansAR subset holds the forms the LVGL shaper emits for the corpus. hi/th/ur are complex-script packs rendered from OFFLINE-shaped glyph runs (lang-packs/<loc>/runs.json, see components/seedsigner/glyph_runs.cpp): hi Devanagari, th Thai, ur Nastaliq (RTL). NOTE: ur currently ships only a minimal AI-generated stub catalog (main-menu + status screens) — to be removed until a real full Urdu translation lands.
